reviews.comment:
Falta de limpieza

(Translated by Google)
Lack of cleanliness
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoT0xUaDBZV0ZuYkdOT2RqUlRPWGhpZUhsd2VuYxAB

reviews.comment:
La de limpieza no solo nos habló de mala manera, sino que también dejó los baños inhabilitados, cerrados con llave más de media hora porque estaba el piso húmedo.

(Translated by Google)
The cleaning lady not only spoke to us rudely, but also left the bathrooms unusable, locked for over half an hour because the floor was wet.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkaWRtdE5OMUZNUVdkbWEyY3lhakp1UW1GSGNVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargué Infinia Diésel el 16/02/2025 a las 9 de la mañana. En una hilux nueva. El combustible larga un olor a combustible de tractor q no se puede creer... no recomiendo cargar vehículos nuevos ahí... si tractores, sembradoras y cosechadoras

Pdta: 900 clientes opinaron muy parecidos? Si descontás los comentarios boots, cuantos te quedan?? A carlitos no...

(Translated by Google)
I filled up with Infinia Diesel on February 16, 2025, at 9:00 AM in a brand new Hilux. The fuel gives off an unbelievable tractor fuel smell... I don't recommend filling up new vehicles there... tractors, seeders, and harvesters are fine.

P.S.: 900 customers gave very similar opinions? If you discount the bot comments, how many are left? Not Carlitos...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnNmJQZEx3EAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, me atendió Javier hoy a la tarde en Boxes, fue muy amable y atento, definitivamente voy a volver!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Javier helped me this afternoon at the Boxes; he was very kind and attentive. I will definitely be back!

reviews.comment:
Fui hoy a la tarde a Boxes y me atendieron muy bien, super atento Javier! El café riquísimo, las chicas de Full muy amables, recomiendo mucho💙

(Translated by Google)
I went to Boxes this afternoon and the service was excellent, Javier was super attentive! The coffee was delicious, the girls at Full were very friendly, I highly recommend it 💙
